scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: लोग कहते थे मेरी English कभी improve नहीं होगी। [People used to say my English will never improve.]
Unknown speaker says: डर लगता था कि कहीं मज़ाक ना बन जाए। [I was scared of being made fun of.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable insecurity about speaking English.
- Sets up the transformation narrative.
- Replaces the original meme audio with a relatable Hindi voiceover.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी fluent English नहीं बोल पाओगे"
me after switching to Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: पर Supernova के AI tutor के साथ... [But with Supernova's AI tutor...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the solution (Supernova's AI tutor).
- Maintains the pacing of the visual montage.
- Shifts the tone from doubt to action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी fluent English नहीं बोल पाओगे"
me after switching to Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: मैंने रोज़ practice की, बिना किसी झिझक के। [I practiced daily, without any hesitation.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Highlights the core feature: daily, judgment-free practice.
- Builds momentum towards the final confident state.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी fluent English नहीं बोल पाओगे"
me after switching to Supernova

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: अब मैं English बोलता हूँ, पूरे confidence के साथ। [Now I speak English, with full confidence.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the emotional payoff of confidence and fluency.
- Acts as a strong concluding statement for the brand.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
"तुम कभी fluent English नहीं बोल पाओगे"
me after switching to Supernova
